articles.title: El Niño Threat Prompts Peru to Extend Halt on Anchovy Fishing
articles.summary: Peru has extended a halt on anchovy fishing due to a warming of the Pacific waters off the country’s coast, as the threat of a weather-roiling El Niño looms.
